heading: Duties of the Superintendent of the Supreme Court Building
label: 6113 Duties of the Superintendent of the Supreme Court Building
text: Except as provided in , all duties and work required for the operation, domestic care, and custody of the Supreme Court Building shall be performed under the direction of the Marshal of the Supreme Court. The Marshal serves as the superintendent of the Building.section 6111(a) of this title
